items.raw_desc: Pálcás aroma diffúzor MILLEFIORI MILANO Lime & Vetiver 250 ml:A MILLEFIORI Milano Lime & Vetiver egy elegáns pálcás aroma diffúzor, amely a béke és harmónia oázisává varázsolja otthonod. A friss, nyári illat a lime és a frézia citrusos és virágos jegyeit a szecsuáni bors és a petitgrain kesernyésen fűszeres keverékével elegyíti. Az illatot továbbá az ámbra és a vetiver fás akkordjai gazdagítják. The game is ideal for parties with friends or family, where each song becomes a challenge and an opportunity to have fun. Start the best playlist and listen carefully. Your task is to guess the year in which each song was released. If you manage to guess both the title of the song and the name of the artist, you will get points and everyone will applaud you. Play continues until one player scores 7 points or the last refrain of the night is played - either way, the winner will be the star of the night.
